positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a celestial journey: a majestic astronaut standing confidently on a glowing crescent moon, looking out at a swirling nebula backdrop. The astronaut wears a sleek, retro-futuristic suit with glowing accents. The composition is symmetrical, featuring dynamic, curved nebulae elements framing the central figure. Style is minimalist sci-fi vector art, high contrast, and bold colors (deep blues, purples, cyan, and pops of gold light). Excellent for screen printing on fabric, clean silhouette, centered focus, 8k digital illustration, intricate details, cosmic pattern, vector lines, negative space usage.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, text, watermark, low resolution, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, artifact, logo, brand, signature, gradient, photorealistic, bokeh
